ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  "split" REAL /* Split ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock price or analytics */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., historical, real-time) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters (e.g., date range, technical indicators) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., stock exchange, financial news feed) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being updated */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "new_price" REAL /* New price of the stock */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., incremental, replacement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_updates_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the alert */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, trading volume anomaly) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
